orrery_project.description: Path to the Orrery project directory (the one containing dashboards/ and connections/).

connection_name.description: Name of the Orrery connection to create or update. Becomes the filename: connections/<name>.yaml

database_file.description: DuckDB file path, relative to the Orrery project directory. Multiple sinks can share one file.

table_name.description: Name of the DuckDB table to write. Becomes the queryable table in Orrery dashboards.

write_mode.description: replace = drop and recreate. append = insert. upsert = requires upsert_keys.

upsert_keys.description: Column names used as the upsert key. Required when write_mode = upsert.

snapshot_label.description: Optional label propagated to Orrery's snapshot system for versioned dashboards.

write_dataset_metadata.description: Emit datasets/<table_name>.yaml metadata file for Orrery discovery.
